case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER RE:DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THE CLAIM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVIDE SUFFICEINT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT ITS CLAIM. THE COURT DISMISSES THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,676.48 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-29-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO
